headline: Jefferies Downgrades ONEOK to Hold, Lowers Price Target to $95
summary: Jefferies  analyst Julien Dumoulin-Smith   downgrades ONEOK (NYSE:OKE) from Buy to Hold and lowers the price target from $100 to $95.
